I want a sidebar for all accounts and hub navigation
So that I can move between accounts without losing context

Acceptance Criteria:

- [ ] The All Accounts option returns to portfolio view.
- [ ] The Back to Hub link navigates to /.
- [ ] Mobile backdrop closes the sidebar.

Notes: Sidebar navigation was restored in follow-up commits.
